---
title: ""
author: "Enno Winkler"
lang: de
format: 
  revealjs:
    footer: Modul 08-006-0007
    pagetitle: "Modul 08-006-0007"
    parallax-background-image: "hintergrund5.jpg"
    parallax-background-size: 4080px 3072px
    parallax-background-horizontal: 200
    parallax-background-vertical: 350
    date: 2011-11-11
resources: 
  - "hintergrund5.jpg"
---

```{r setup}
# if (!requireNamespace("needs"   )) install.packages("needs")
# if (!requireNamespace("excelbib")) install_github("Enno-W/excelbib")
# needs("excelbib", "xfun")
# xlsx_to_bib(from_root("References.xlsx"))
```

## Transtheoretical Model (TTM)

![Transtheoretical](TTM.svg){#fig-ttm}

## HAPA

![Health Action Process Approach](HAPA.svg){#fig-hapa}

## Das Rückfallmodell

![Rückfallmodell nach Marlatt und Gordon](rueckfall.svg){#fig-rueckfall}


# Literaturverzeichnis

# Literaturverzeichnis


::: refs
:::
